title: Minimal Product Studio Shot
desc: Turn product attributes into clean ad-ready studio visuals with repeatable lighting logic.
prompt_template: Studio photo of {product} on {surface}. Use {lighting_setup}, {background}, and a {camera_angle} angle. Include soft shadow edge detail and ad-ready composition.
author: studio-baseline
final_prompt: Studio photo of a matte white ceramic diffuser on brushed travertine surface. Use top softbox with low-intensity side fill, warm neutral gradient background, and a slight top-down 3/4 camera angle. Include soft shadow edge detail and ad-ready composition.
